arts.ttl: Mbappé scores twice to give Real Madrid 2-1 win against Villarreal in La Liga
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé scored twice to lead Real Madrid to a 2-1 comeback win at Villarreal and move three points clear atop the Spanish league on Saturday. Barcelona is three points behind Madrid but has played two games less.

arts.ttl: Villarreal 1-2 Real Madrid: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Kylian Mbappe brace fires Los Blancos to La Liga summit
arts.sum: Real Madrid move to the top of the La Liga table courtesy of a 2-1 victory over Villarreal, with Kylian Mbappe hitting a brace for the capital giants.

arts.ttl: ‘He’s back’ – Real Madrid star comes in for widespread praise for performance vs Villarreal
arts.sum: A member of the midfield ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid has on Saturday evening come in for widespread adulation. This comes owing to his performance in the club’s…

arts.ttl: ‘Incredible’ Man Utd Star Eyed by Real Madrid for Shock Transfer
arts.sum: Real Madrid are 'closely monitoring' Manchester United star Kobbie Mainoo and contract talks have hit a brick wall.

arts.ttl: Villarreal 1–2 Real Madrid: Player Ratings As Kylian Mbappe's Brace Inspires Comeback Victory
arts.sum: Two goals from Kylian Mbappé secured Real Madrid's 1–2 victory against Villarreal.

The Real Madrid team looked refreshed after their Champions League triumph midweek. Real Madrid managed to secure another important three points in the title race, momentarily putting them at the top of the tree.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappé breaks Ronaldo record with Real Madrid goals vs Villarreal

arts.ttl: Barcelona boss weighs in on Julian Alvarez penalty controversy against Real Madrid
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick offered his condolences to Atletico Madrid forward Julian Alvarez.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappé hits two impressive goalscoring benchmarks with Real Madrid brace vs Villarreal
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Kylian Mbappé has on Saturday secured for himself an altogether impressive individual benchmark. This comes owing to developments in Real’s meeting with Villarreal. Carlo Ancelotti’s troops are…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid ‘will make a concrete attempt’ to sign Arsenal star
